import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    """Extract observation for navigation task."""
    # Get grid dimensions
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Agent position (normalized to [0, 1])
    agent_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_agent_y = agent_pos[0] / (H - 1)
    norm_agent_x = agent_pos[1] / (W - 1)
    
    # Agent direction (one-hot encoded)
    agent_dir_onehot = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4, dtype=jnp.float32)
    
    # Find goal position
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)  # GOAL tile has ID 6
    
    # Get coordinates using meshgrid
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    # Goal position (normalized, using mean in case of multiple goals)
    goal_count = jnp.maximum(jnp.sum(goal_mask), 1.0)  # Avoid division by zero
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / goal_count
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / goal_count
    norm_goal_y = goal_y / (H - 1)
    norm_goal_x = goal_x / (W - 1)
    
    # Distance to goal (normalized by max possible distance)
    dist_to_goal = jnp.sqrt((agent_pos[0] - goal_y)**2 + (agent_pos[1] - goal_x)**2)
    max_dist = jnp.sqrt((H - 1)**2 + (W - 1)**2)
    norm_dist = dist_to_goal / max_dist
    
    # Concatenate all features
    observation = jnp.concatenate([
        jnp.array([norm_agent_y, norm_agent_x]),  # Agent position (2)
        agent_dir_onehot,                         # Agent direction (4)
        jnp.array([norm_goal_y, norm_goal_x]),    # Goal position (2)
        jnp.array([norm_dist])                    # Distance to goal (1)
    ])
    
    return observation

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    """Compute reward for navigation task."""
    # Get grid dimensions
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Find goal position (same logic as in observation)
    goal_mask = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == 6)
    ys = jnp.arange(H, dtype=jnp.float32)
    xs = jnp.arange(W, dtype=jnp.float32)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    
    goal_count = jnp.maximum(jnp.sum(goal_mask), 1.0)
    goal_y = jnp.sum(yy * goal_mask) / goal_count
    goal_x = jnp.sum(xx * goal_mask) / goal_count
    
    # Calculate distances
    agent_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    next_agent_pos = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    
    prev_dist = jnp.sqrt((agent_pos[0] - goal_y)**2 + (agent_pos[1] - goal_x)**2)
    curr_dist = jnp.sqrt((next_agent_pos[0] - goal_y)**2 + (next_agent_pos[1] - goal_x)**2)
    
    # Distance-based shaping reward
    distance_reward = prev_dist - curr_dist
    
    # Check if agent is on goal tile
    agent_on_goal = (next_state.grid[next_agent_pos[0].astype(jnp.int32), 
                                   next_agent_pos[1].astype(jnp.int32), 0] == 6)
    goal_bonus = jax.lax.select(agent_on_goal, 10.0, 0.0)
    
    # Small step penalty for efficiency
    step_penalty = -0.01
    
    # Total reward
    total_reward = distance_reward + goal_bonus + step_penalty
    
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
